studyName: Contextual and Health Behavior Effects on Epigenetic Aging Among Africans in the Family and Community Health Studies

variables.name: AgeW7
variables.description: To begin, how old are you? Even if your birthday is tomorrow or next week, what is your age today?

variables.name: AgeW8
variables.description: To begin, how old are you? Even if your birthday is tomorrow or next week, what is your age today?

variables.name: G7E4492
variables.description: How much do you smoke cigarettes now?

variables.name: G7E5154
variables.description: In the last year how often... Has someone said something insulting to you just because of your race or ethnic background? Is it...

variables.name: G7E5155
variables.description: In the last year how often...Has a store-owner, sales clerk, or person working at a place of business treated you in a disrespectful way just because of your race or ethnic background? Is it...

variables.name: G7E5156
variables.description: In the last year how often...Have the police hassled you just because of your race or ethnic background? Is it...

variables.name: G7E5157
variables.description: In the last year how often...Has someone ignored you or excluded you from some activity just because of your race or ethnic background? Is it...

variables.name: G7E5158
variables.description: In the last year how often...Has someone suspected you of doing something wrong just because of your race or ethnic background? Is it...

variables.name: G7E5159
variables.description: In the last year how often...Has someone yelled a racial slur or racial insult at you just because of your race or ethnic background? Is it...

variables.name: G7E5160
variables.description: In the last year how often...Has someone threatened to harm you physically just because of your race or ethnic background? Is it...

variables.name: G7E5161
variables.description: In the last year how often...Have you encountered people who are surprised that you, given your race or ethnic background, did something really well? Is it...

variables.name: G7E5162
variables.description: In the last year how often...Have you been treated unfairly just because of your race or ethnic background? Is it...

variables.name: G7E5163
variables.description: In the last year how often...Have you encountered people who didn't expect you to do well just because of your race or ethnic background? Is it...

variables.name: G7E5164
variables.description: In the last year how often...Has someone discouraged you from trying to achieve an important goal just because of your race or ethnic background? Is it...

variables.name: G7E5165
variables.description: In the last year how often...Have your close friends been treated unfairly just because of their race or ethnic background? Is it...

variables.name: G7E5166
variables.description: In the last year how often...Have members of your family been treated unfairly just because of their race or ethnic background? Is it...

variables.name: G7F5320
variables.description: Now, some questions about your thoughts on smoking. Have you ever smoked cigarettes?

variables.name: G7T5090
variables.description: How many cigarettes have you smoked in the last 3 months?

variables.name: G7T5247
variables.description: The next set of questions asks about bouts of depression or sadness. In the past year, was there ever a two week period when you...Felt sad, empty, or depressed most of the day?

variables.name: G7T5248
variables.description: In the past year, was there ever a two week period when you... Lost interest in things?

variables.name: G7T5249
variables.description: In the past year, was there ever a two week period when you...Woke up at least two hours before you wanted to?

variables.name: G7T5251
variables.description: In the past year, was there ever a two week period when you...Couldn't sit still and paced up and down or couldn't keep your hands still when sitting?

variables.name: G7T5252
variables.description: In the past year, was there ever a two week period when you...Felt worthless nearly every day?

variables.name: G7T5257
variables.description: In the past year, was there ever a two week period when you...Lost the ability to enjoy having good things happen to you, like winning something or being praised or complimented?

variables.name: G7T5259
variables.description: In the past year, was there ever a two week period when you...Felt so low that you thought about committing suicide?

variables.name: G7T5261
variables.description: In the past year, was there ever a two week period when you...Took medication for depression?

variables.name: G7T5262
variables.description: In the past year, was there ever a two week period when you...Were so depressed or sad that it interfered with your ability to do your job, take care of your house or family, or take care of yourself?

variables.name: G7T5287
variables.description: How would you describe your health right now?
